title: Key stage 2 tests: 2025 mathematics test modified materials
body: "KS2 mathematics tests were administered in schools in May 2025. Modified test materials, test administration instructions and mark scheme amendments are also provided.  Please refer to the copyright ownership report for details of how schools, educational establishments and third parties can use these materials.  We revised the formats for the 2025 KS2 MLP test papers based on additional research about their accessibility and adaptability, as well as feedback from users. They are available in:   A4 portrait, 24 point, non-adaptable PDF format (used to produce printed booklets for schools) A4 portrait, 24 point, adaptable Word format (for pupils requiring an A4 24pt version that requires further modification) A4 portrait, 18 point, adaptable Word format (for pupils requiring this font size, also if further modifications are required) A3 portrait, 36 point, adaptable Word format (for pupils requiring this font size, also if further modifications are required) A3 landscape, 48 point, adaptable Word format (for pupils requiring this font size, also if further modifications are required)   Schools that wish to use the adaptable formats to make further adaptations to the materials for their pupils should refer to the guidance on making adaptations to KS2 MLP test materials.  "
